raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "There have been reports from constituents and the media regarding fraudulently stolen funds related to the Middle Class Tax Refunds.",
    "Many constituents have not received their refund or have encountered difficulties in seeking assistance from the Franchise Tax Board (FTB).",
    "Californians are struggling to deal with rising inflation, higher rents, and food costs, making them reliant on refunds promised to them last year.",
    "The audit intends to investigate the prevalence of fraud involving the debit cards connected to the Middle Class Tax Refunds.",
    "The effectiveness of the FTB's fraud detection and reduction efforts will be assessed in the audit.",
    "The audit will evaluate whether the FTB adequately protects Californians' privacy and personal information.",
    "The responsiveness of the FTB to Californians experiencing fraud will be examined in the audit.",
    "The audit aims to determine if the FTB has provided Middle Class Tax Refunds to all Californians entitled to them.",
    "The audit will assess the sufficiency of oversight provided by the FTB to the vendor issuing debit cards."
  ]
}
```
